full_text:
Zhou Xuan (Konghe) 周宣 (孔和)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Xuan (周宣), styledKonghe (孔和), was born in Le’an. Interpretor of dreams, right nine times out of ten. Warned about female rebels. Zhou Xuan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhou Xuan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
